content.title: Professional Summary
content.text: Engineering leader with 15+ years scaling organizations through hypergrowth and transformation, built on 25+ years of software development experience. Managed $7M+ budgets while growing teams from startup to enterprise scale. Deep expertise in platform modernization, engineering culture, and cross-functional delivery. Led international expansion, M&A integration, and technical transformations that accelerate time to value.

roles.title: Senior Director of Engineering
description: Lead Analyze product engineering, delivering customer-facing data insights and visualization features through team performance excellence, architectural strategy, and cross-functional execution.

Chair company-wide Gen AI adoption initiative with CTO sponsorship, leading cross-functional team across 400+ engineers. Drove adoption from 20% to 70% in three months, delivering 25% increase in developer output and 60% reduction in pull request cycle time.
Manage $7M+ budget across 50+ engineers in five teams, with oversight of one director, four engineering managers and a principal engineer.

Transformed underperforming org through strategic process improvements, achieving 3X feature delivery increase and becoming the company's highest performer, with practices driving company-wide velocity gains.

Spearheaded company-wide architectural modernization strategy, halting years-long over-budget rewrite in favor of evolutionary transformation that salvaged incomplete work and delivered immediate customer value.
Led M&A integration across 5 time zones and 4 offices, establishing a scalable Analysis platform that delivered breakthrough multi-survey capabilities and enabled enterprise competitiveness.
Established CI/CD quality framework delivering 22-point CSAT improvement (48% to 70%) and 34% reduction in support cases; adopted org-wide enabling similar quality gains across multiple teams.

experience.companyDescription: Series B ITSM AI/SaaS startup, scaled to 50+ engineers

roles.title: VP of Design Engineering
description: Built engineering and design teams from 0-to-1; developed organizational structure, defined UX strategy, and established recruiting practices that attracted top engineering talent during rapid company growth.
Created engineering leadership program, achieving 100% internal promotion rate for management roles and eliminating external hiring costs throughout tenure.

Partnered with CEO and CPO to architect extensible platform enabling strategic pivot to incident deflection, driving 200%+ increase in deal sizes, reducing churn, and contributing to patent portfolio.
Established engineering operations for the company's Guadalajara office; scaled development team from zero to 30+ engineers while developing hiring strategies and establishing company culture.
Orchestrated consolidation of disparate customer-facing applications across multiple tech stacks, creating cohesive customer experience and reducing time-to-release by over 50%.

Implemented agile development and distributed communication framework, designing process standards that enabled efficient distributed and cross-functional collaboration and sustained development velocity during scaling.

roles.title: Head of Engineering
description: 3rd full-time hire, reported directly to CEO. Relocated to Merida, Mexico for 9 months to build engineering and design teams from scratch, establishing PlayerPro's offshore development capability.
Led engineering and design teams in cross-functional product development, launching a player data platform and establishing technical architecture for sports analytics solutions.

Delivered technical platform and data architecture that enabled strategic partnerships with international sports organizations, including Liga MX and La Liga, expanding market reach across multiple regions.

content.title: Skills
content.text:
**Leadership:** Organizational Scaling, Strategic Planning, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Technical Roadmap Development, Stakeholder Communication, Team Building and Mentorship, Recruiting and Hiring, Platform Architecture, Compliance & Security Frameworks (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI), Engineering Productivity, Diversity and Inclusion

**Tools and Tech:** React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Node, Nx, MySQL, AWS, Docker, Kafka, OpenSearch, Cloudflare, Vercel, Git, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Circle CI, VSCode, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, MCP, n8n, Jira, Slack, Confluence
